name: py-lru-cache
testCode:
cache = LRUCache(2)
cache.put('a', 1)
cache.put('b', 2)
assert cache.get('a') == 1
cache.put('c', 3)
assert cache.get('b') is None
assert cache.get('c') == 3
assert len(cache) == 2
description: Python LRU cache using OrderedDict

name: py-group-by
testCode:
result = group_by([1, 2, 3, 4, 5], lambda x: 'even' if x % 2 == 0 else 'odd')
assert len(result['even']) == 2
assert len(result['odd']) == 3
assert group_by([], lambda x: x) == {}
description: Group list items by key function
